# How to create a course for CodeQuest

CodeQuest is a gamified learning platform. 
When creating a new course or adding content, please provide a JSON object with the following nested structure:

```json
{
  "language": "python",
  "sections": [
    {
      "title": "Section 1: The Basics",
      "chapters": [
        {
          "title": "Chapter 1: Hello World",
          "lessons": [
            {
              "title": "Lesson 1: Printing",
              "description": "A short description of the lesson.",
              "content": "Markdown content explaining the concept. Use code blocks for examples.",
              "challenge": "The task the user needs to complete.",
              "hint": "An optional helpful hint.",
              "initialCode": "# Write your code here\n",
              "expectedOutput": "The exact string output expected from the user's code.",
              "type": "beginner"
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

Make sure the `expectedOutput` exactly matches what the `initialCode` (when solved) will print to stdout.
The `language` field specifies which programming language this course is for (e.g., "python", "javascript").
